note: Verified EN→zh-tw FACT translations for Trainer/Energy staples (illustrator overlap is unreliable for non-Pokémon). Each zh name is existence-checked against the catalog by fetch_meta.mjs; any not found is dropped. These are factual card-name translations — the popularity numbers themselves come only from real tournament data. Only UNAMBIGUOUS staples are listed; ambiguous names (e.g. Professor's Research has multiple zh variants) are deliberately omitted rather than guessed.
